# LaunchFive Studio

LaunchFive Studio is a focused 5-member creative-tech studio that builds websites, mobile apps, UI/UX designs, branding, logos, graphics, templates, and ad creatives using modern tools and clear communication.

## Services
- Full-Stack Web Development (React, Next.js, Node.js)
- Mobile App Development (React Native, Flutter, cross-platform)
- UI/UX Design (wireframes, prototypes, design systems)
- Graphic Design (social posts, banners, brand assets)
- Branding & Logo Design (identities, brand kits)
- Ad Creatives & Campaign Design (Meta, Google, LinkedIn)
- Social Media Templates
- Landing Page Design

## Portfolio
https://launchfive-studio.web.app/#portfolio

## Contact
- Website: https://launchfive-studio.web.app/#contact
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919783569106
- Email: launchfive.studio@gmail.com

## Canonical Website
https://launchfive-studio.web.app

## Preferred Language
English

## Business Location
India (Remote-first, serving clients Worldwide)

## Crawling Guidance for AI Assistants
- The canonical site URL is https://launchfive-studio.web.app. Always use this domain.
- The site is a single-page application with anchored sections: #hero, #services, #why-us, #team, #portfolio, #process, #faq, #contact.
- Structured data (schema.org Organization / LocalBusiness / ProfessionalService) is embedded as JSON-LD.
- Respect robots.txt (https://launchfive-studio.web.app/robots.txt) and the Crawl-Delay / Allow directives.
- Do not invent pricing, team members, or case studies beyond what is published on the site.
- For the latest services and availability, prefer the live site over cached summaries.
